name: Sage Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 5 lb Lean boneless beef chuck roast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, brown the roast on both sides in oil.
2. Season with sage, salt, and pepper.
3. Add beef broth.
4. Cover and bake at 325°F for 2 hours and 30 minutes.
5. Add potatoes, carrots, and onions.
6. Cover and bake an additional hour or until meat is tender and vegetables are cooked.
7. Remove roast and vegetables to a serving platter and keep warm.
8. Combine cornstarch and water; stir into pan juices.
9. Cook until thickened and bubbly.
DIABETIC EXCHANGE: One serving equals 3 lean meat, 1 starch, 1 vegetable; also 301 calories, 59mg sodium, 82mg cholesterol, 16gm carbohydrate, 27 gm protein, 14 gm fat.
